creator: jseger@freebsd.scds.com
text:
Okay, thanks. I now have a final version of the port ready. It install the
manpages if NOPORTDOCS is not set. It will also install the bind4 to bind8
conversion script. It doesn't install anything else from the doc distribution
because that appears to be all for bind4 and was just left in there.

The final version is at ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/bind-port-updated2.tgz

-Justin Seger-
